lockingPolicy.lockReason: Artifact-shape regression scenarios are the contractual proof of the spec.md banner sweep across 54 certified specs; any future change to the scenario set requires explicit invalidation evidence per Gate G058/G059.

tdd.rationale: Artifact-only portfolio-wide documentation drift; zero runtime code changed. Per policySnapshot.tdd.mode = exempt with user-request provenance.
tdd.redGreenEvidence: Red state: enumeration script reports 'Total drifted: 54' against main pre-sweep (bug.md Reproduction Steps). Green state: enumeration script reports 'Total drifted: 0' post-sweep; per-spec canonical banner grep returns the canonical Done line for all 54 affected specs; change boundary confined to specs/NNN-*/spec.md (54 paths) + specs/_ops/OPS-001-spec-banner-sweep/ (8 paths).

scenarios.title: Category A — Draft banner replaced with canonical Done banner (23 specs)
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: For each Category A spec, `grep -E '^\*\*Status:\*\*' spec.md` returns exactly `**Status:** Done (certified per state.json)`

scenarios.title: Category B — canonical banner inserted under H1 (27 specs)
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: For each Category B spec, the canonical banner line sits on the second non-blank logical line of spec.md (right after the H1) with one blank line on each side and no duplicate blanks. The implementing agent MUST resolve the exact 034-039 / 043-055 directory names at execution time (this manifest enumerates by NNN prefix).

scenarios.title: Category C — multi-word stale banner replaced (3 specs: 038, 040, 041)
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: For each Category C spec, `grep 'Draft (analyst-owned requirements sections' spec.md` returns zero matches AND `grep -E '^\*\*Status:\*\*' spec.md` returns exactly `**Status:** Done (certified per state.json)`. The implementing agent MUST resolve exact directory names at execution time.

scenarios.title: Category D — spec 056 planning-packet banner reconciled
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Spec 056 `grep -E '^\*\*Status:\*\*' spec.md` returns exactly `**Status:** Done (was planning packet — promoted on certification)`. The implementing agent MUST resolve the exact spec-056 directory name at execution time.

scenarios.title: Portfolio drift count returns to zero post-sweep
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Re-running the enumeration script (per bug.md Reproduction Steps) post-sweep reports 'Total drifted: 0'

scenarios.title: Idempotence — re-running the sweep produces zero diff
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: After applying the sweep once and committing, re-applying the sweep logic against the same tree yields `git diff --name-only` with no paths

scenarios.title: Change boundary respected
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: `git diff --name-only` returns only paths matching `^specs/(0[0-9]{2}|056)-[^/]+/spec\.md$` or `^specs/_ops/OPS-001-spec-banner-sweep/`; zero state.json/design.md/scopes.md/report.md/uservalidation.md/scenario-manifest.json of the 54 target specs; zero code/compose/.github paths

scenarios.title: No over-reach — 2 already-correct certified specs untouched
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Neither of the 2 certified specs whose spec.md already carries `**Status:** Done (...)` appears in `git diff --name-only`. The implementing agent MUST identify the 2 specs at execution time by inverting the enumeration script.

scenarios.title: Packet artifact-lint + state-transition-guard pass at specs_hardened ceiling
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: `bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/_ops/OPS-001-spec-banner-sweep` exits 0; `bash .github/bubbles/scripts/state-transition-guard.sh specs/_ops/OPS-001-spec-banner-sweep` returns 🟢 TRANSITION PERMITTED at workflowMode=spec-scope-hardening / statusCeiling=specs_hardened
